title: Internal Go structures in debug log
body:
From https://github.com/containers/skopeo/issues/2778#issuecomment-3720969603 :

```
DEBU[0002] Unable to get destination image &{{%!s(*directory.dirImageSource=&{{0xc00033e730} {{false}} {} {dir} {/tmp/registry/dhi.io/nginx:1.28-alpine3.21 /tmp/registry/dhi.io/nginx:1.28-alpine3.21}})} {{%!s(bool=false)}} {} {dir} {/tmp/registry/dhi.io/nginx:1.28-alpine3.21 /tmp/registry/dhi.io/nginx:1.28-alpine3.21}}/sha256:151cb345b50da35a1a87b31fc441226e61ba4ed9a2eeeffa52ba60fbc47e22cb manifest: open /tmp/registry/dhi.io/nginx:1.28-alpine3.21/151cb345b50da35a1a87b31fc441226e61ba4ed9a2eeeffa52ba60fbc47e22cb.manifest.json: no such file or directory
```
